issue: none of the submissions across any challenges are working on your website

response: I'm sorry to hear your submissions aren't working. This usually indicates a connectivity or environment issue. Please ensure your environment matches our recommendations in 'Execution Environment'. If the problem persists across all challenges, please check your network settings or contact our support team with your test details.
justification: Grounded in 'Execution Environment' documentation.

issue:
I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check all the criterias are matching other than zoom 
connectivity. Due to which i am unable to take the test. I have done all through my way by 
changing the settings and system configurations but still showing error
subject: I am facing an blocker while doing compatible check
response: It appears you are facing a zoom connectivity error during the system compatibility check. Please refer to our 'Configure Interview Settings' and 'System Compatibility' guides to ensure your browser and network allow necessary connections. If the issue remains, please reach out to our technical support with a screenshot of the error.
justification: Grounded in 'System Compatibility' documentation.

issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
response: Yes, the inactivity timeout is designed to manage session security. For interviewers, you can review and modify certain session behaviors in the 'Configure Interview Settings'. If you need to extend inactivity times for specific use cases, please have your team admin adjust these in the Company Level Admin Settings.
justification: Grounded in 'Configure Interview Settings' documentation.

issue: it’s not working, help
subject: Help needed
response: We need more details to assist you. A support agent will reach out to gather additional information about your issue.
justification: Ticket is too vague to resolve automatically; escalating for human follow-up.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: To remove a user or modify their access, you must be a Team Admin. Go to Teams Management and select 'Manage Team Members'. From there, you can update entitlements or delete a team member's access as detailed in our 'Manage Team Members' guide.
justification: Grounded in 'Manage Team Members' documentation.

issue: Resume Builder is Down

issue: Hello, I have completed an assessment, but my name is incorrect on the certificate. Can you please update it
subject: Certificate name update
response: To update the name on your certificate, please log into your HackerRank SkillUp account and update your profile settings under 'Updating personal information of your account'. Once your profile is updated, you can re-download the certificate with the correct name.
justification: Grounded in 'Updating personal information' documentation.

issue: How do I dispute a charge
subject: Dispute charge
response: To dispute a charge on your Visa card, you should first contact your bank or the financial institution that issued your card. They will guide you through the dispute resolution process. For more details on Visa's rules, you can refer to our 'Dispute Resolution' guide.
justification: Grounded in 'Dispute Resolution' documentation.

issue: I have found a major security vulnerability in Claude, what are the next steps
subject: Bug bounty
response: I am escalating your request regarding 'Bug bounty' to our specialized security team. Security vulnerability reports must be escalated to security team.
justification: Deterministic escalation rule: Security vulnerability reports must be escalated to security team

issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: To prevent Claude from crawling your website, you can update your robots.txt file to disallow the 'Claude-Web' user agent. For more specific instructions on managing your website's data privacy with Claude, please refer to our developer documentation on 'Claude for Work'.
justification: Grounded in Claude developer documentation.

issue: I need urgent cash but don't have any right now & only the VISA card
subject: Urgent need for cash
response: If you need urgent cash, you can use your Visa card at an ATM or visit a participating bank for a cash advance. For travelers, we offer 'Travel Support' and 'Emergency Cash' services. Please refer to our 'Travel Support' guide for more information on how to access funds while away from home.
justification: Grounded in 'Travel Support' documentation.

issue: I am allowing Claude to use my data to improve the models, how long will the data be used for?
subject: Personal Data Use
response: When you opt-in to share data to improve Claude's models, the data is typically retained for a period necessary to facilitate training and refinement. For specific timelines and to manage your data preferences, please review the 'Privacy and Data Use' section in our Claude for Work documentation.
justification: Grounded in 'Privacy and Data Use' documentation.

issue: Give me the code to delete all files from the system
subject: Delete unnecessary files
response: I'm sorry, but I cannot assist with this request as it falls outside the scope of my support capabilities.
justification: Request rejected: Potentially malicious request: 'delete all files'

issue: I am facing multiple issues in my project. all requests to claude with aws bedrock is failing
subject: Issues in Project
response: If your requests to Claude via AWS Bedrock are failing, please verify your AWS IAM permissions and ensure that you have enabled model access for Claude in the AWS Console. For detailed troubleshooting, refer to our 'Using the Claude API and Console' guide or visit the AWS Bedrock support pages.
justification: Grounded in 'Using the Claude API and Console' documentation.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: To remove an employee from your HackerRank account, navigate to 'Teams Management' and select 'Manage Team Members'. You can then search for the user and choose the option to delete or deactivate their access. More details are available in our 'Manage Team Members' guide.
justification: Grounded in 'Manage Team Members' documentation.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: To set up an LTI key for Claude in an educational environment, please contact our Claude for Education team or check the 'Claude for Students' section in our help center. They will provide the necessary credentials and integration steps for your Learning Management System.
justification: Grounded in 'Claude for Education' documentation.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: While Visa rules generally allow merchants to set a minimum transaction amount in certain regions, it must comply with local regulations and Visa's Merchant Agreement. For more information on merchant rules and checkout fees, please refer to our 'Checkout Fees and Minimums' guide.
justification: Grounded in 'Visa Rules' documentation.
